time_window.rationale: User-specified default: Oct 7 local time through first 48 hours.

canonicalization_rules: Normalize kibbutz/city names to a single English canonical (e.g., Kibbutz Be'eri).
Distinguish Re'im Base (Gaza Division HQ) from Kibbutz Re'im.
Treat named junctions, memorial sites, and road segments as distinct locations when explicitly named.
Do not count transit roads unless source describes them as a combat/deployment node.

confidence_definitions.VERIFIED: Explicitly named unit+location in official IDF publication OR probe-based reconstruction tied to an IDF probe/investigation.
confidence_definitions.LIKELY: Named unit+location by a major outlet but not clearly tied to a probe or lacking corroboration.
confidence_definitions.UNCONFIRMED: Attachment-only claim without retrievable URL and/or without specific location; or otherwise not corroborated.

resolution_rules: Prefer official IDF publications and published inquiries.
Prefer Hebrew-language official/primary sources over translations/secondary.
Prefer probe-based reconstructions that explicitly attribute to an IDF probe.
Require a source that names BOTH the unit AND the location to mark VERIFIED.
source_priority_order: timesofisrael.com probe-based reconstructions tied to IDF probes
Israel Police / ISA official releases (when available)
Ynet / Haaretz / Walla / Mako (major Israeli outlets)
